title: Form Submit
description: Handle a form submission event and prevent the default browser behavior.
problemStatement:
Handle clicks properly! Create a form with a single button. Add an `onSubmit` handler to the `<form>` that prevents the page from refreshing and prints `"Form Sent!"` to the console.

**Requirement:** Call `e.preventDefault()` inside the handler.
hints: The default behavior of an HTML form is to reload the page on submit.
expectedOutput: Console log showing 'Form Sent!' without the page reloading
